source_pr.title: ttl: use `SQL_NO_CACHE` to skip tikv block cache for TTL scan queries
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #43206

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
ttl: use `SQL_NO_CACHE` to skip tikv block cache for TTL scan queries
```

symptoms: TTL scan query behavior change (adding `SQL_NO_CACHE`), but no concrete flaky failure signature is captured.
failure_signature: No concrete flaky failure signature captured (TTL scan query change)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR changes the TTL scan SQL by adding `SQL_NO_CACHE` to avoid using TiKV block cache, and updates the corresponding SQL builder tests. The case data does not provide a concrete flaky failure signature (logs/assertions/timeout) showing an intermittent issue, nor does the patch show a targeted stabilization mechanism tied to a flaky symptom. Keep this as insufficient evidence until we have failing CI logs or a PR explicitly addressing a specific flaky behavior.
fix_pattern: Feature/behavior change PR without a concrete flaky failure signature or targeted stabilization mechanism; keep as insufficient evidence.

evidence: evidence: mustBuild(b, "SELECT LOW_PRIORITY SQL_NO_CACHE `id` FROM `test`.`t1` ORDER BY `id` ASC") (ttl/sqlbuilder/sql_test.go)

analysis:
PR title: ttl: use `SQL_NO_CACHE` to skip tikv block cache for TTL scan queries
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/43229
Triage sources: manual_triage, determinism_stabilization
Triage summary: mustBuild(b, "SELECT LOW_PRIORITY SQL_NO_CACHE `id` FROM `test`.`t1` ORDER BY `id` ASC") (ttl/sqlbuilder/sql_test.go)
Changed files (3): ttl/sqlbuilder/sql.go, ttl/sqlbuilder/sql_test.go, ttl/ttlworker/scan_test.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
